youtube.description:
Hey what’s up guys!

Welcome to LarpularMMOs, a channel inspired by the golden age of YouTube. Join me and Larping With Femma as we take on survival worlds, arena battles, challenges, mods, and all kinds of crazy adventures.

If you miss the classic YouTube era, you’re in the right place. New videos coming soon!

(We are not trying to replace PopularMMOs, we are simply parodying. We love PopularMMOs and do not mean any harm. We are not a replacement)

latestvideo.title: Roblox Roleplaying for the first time | LarpularMMOs & Femma
